# AutoMoney Store - AI & Digital Products Marketplace
> Fully automated digital products marketplace accepting USDT TRC-20 payments. 250+ premium products including AI workflows, templates, business guides, and automation tools. Built with Cloudflare Workers and TRON blockchain verification.

## Store
- [AutoMoney Store](https://automoney-store.pages.dev): Main storefront with all 250+ products
- [AgentPro](https://agentpro.pages.dev): AI agent superstore with 80+ free tools
- [MaoMaoLove](https://maomaolove.pages.dev): Digital products marketplace

## Premium Products (USDT TRC-20)

## Free Tools
- [80+ Free AI & SEO Tools](https://agentpro.pages.dev/tools/): Meta tag analyzer, keyword density checker, sitemap generator, schema markup generator, QR code generator, word counter, readability score, SERP preview, and more

## Blog
- [Blog Home](https://automoney-store.pages.dev/blog/): SEO, GEO, AI automation, USDT payment guides

## Key Information
- **Payments**: USDT TRC-20 (Tron network)
- **Delivery**: Instant after payment verification via Trongrid API
- **Wallet**: TRnz5Pi8R3hjCbBjnDuZo7ZvR57euo2q8Z
- **Support**: Email support via Cloudflare Workers
- **Affiliate Program**: 20% commission with ?ref= tracking

## FAQ
- How to buy: Select product → Send USDT to wallet → Enter tx + email → Get download link
- What payment methods: USDT TRC-20 only — no credit cards, no KYC
- Delivery time: Instant after blockchain confirmation (30-60 seconds)
- Refund policy: Due to digital nature, all sales are final
